title: Create a REST API for Order Management
scenario: Design a REST API for managing orders, including endpoints for creating, updating, and retrieving orders. The API should also include a feature to cancel or update the status of an order. The output should be a well-structured code snippet with clear comments and documentation.
constraints: Must use a popular programming language (e.g. Python, Java, JavaScript)
Must follow conventional REST API design principles
Must include at least 5 API endpoints for order management

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the code snippet adhere to the given constraints?
Does the API design follow conventional REST API design principles?
Is the code snippet well-structured and documented?
